API Reference

class reporting.Document(title: 'str', author: 'str' = '', theme: 'Theme' = <factory>, slides: 'list[Slide]' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Document & Slide

Document — a complete report container holding multiple slides.

class reporting.document.Document(title: 'str', author: 'str' = '', theme: 'Theme' = <factory>, slides: 'list[Slide]' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Slide — a single page in a report with grid layout and NumPy-style cell access.

Layout

class reporting.layout.AxisConstraints(min_size: 'float' = 0.0, max_size: 'float' = inf)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Constraints(width: 'AxisConstraints' = <factory>, height: 'AxisConstraints' = <factory>, min_aspect_ratio: 'Optional[float]' = None, max_aspect_ratio: 'Optional[float]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Edges(left: 'float' = 0.0, top: 'float' = 0.0, right: 'float' = 0.0, bottom: 'float' = 0.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Grid(rows: 'int', cols: 'int', row_sizes: 'Optional[list[Sizing]]' = None, col_sizes: 'Optional[list[Sizing]]' = None, gap: 'float' = 0.0, padding: 'Optional[Edges]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.GridCell(panel: 'Panel', element: 'Optional[object]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.GridPosition(row: 'int', col: 'int')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.LengthValue(value: 'float', sizing_type: 'SizingType')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Panel(row: 'int' = 0, col: 'int' = 0, rowspan: 'int' = 1, colspan: 'int' = 1, padding: 'Edges' = <factory>, margin: 'Edges' = <factory>, background_color: 'Optional[str]' = None, border: 'Optional[str]' = None, border_radius: 'float' = 0.0, h_align: 'HAlign' = <HAlign.STRETCH: 'stretch'>, v_align: 'VAlign' = <VAlign.STRETCH: 'stretch'>, constraints: 'Constraints' = <factory>, min_size: 'Size' = <factory>, fixed_size: 'Optional[Size]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Point(x, y)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

x: float

Alias for field number 0

y: float

Alias for field number 1

class reporting.layout.Rect(x: 'float', y: 'float', width: 'float', height: 'float')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.Size(width, height)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

height: float

Alias for field number 1

width: float

Alias for field number 0

Pure geometry primitives — no visual representation concepts, no renderer imports.

class reporting.layout.geometry.Edges(left: 'float' = 0.0, top: 'float' = 0.0, right: 'float' = 0.0, bottom: 'float' = 0.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.geometry.Point(x, y)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

x: float

Alias for field number 0

y: float

Alias for field number 1

class reporting.layout.geometry.Rect(x: 'float', y: 'float', width: 'float', height: 'float')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.geometry.Size(width, height)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

height: float

Alias for field number 1

width: float

Alias for field number 0

Sizing primitives for layout — pure math, no renderer imports.

class reporting.layout.sizing.LengthValue(value: 'float', sizing_type: 'SizingType')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.sizing.SizingType(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

Layout constraints — pure math, no renderer imports.

class reporting.layout.constraints.AxisConstraints(min_size: 'float' = 0.0, max_size: 'float' = inf)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.constraints.Constraints(width: 'AxisConstraints' = <factory>, height: 'AxisConstraints' = <factory>, min_aspect_ratio: 'Optional[float]' = None, max_aspect_ratio: 'Optional[float]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

Panel — a rectangular region within a grid layout.

No renderer dependencies. Pure layout geometry.

class reporting.layout.panel.HAlign(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

class reporting.layout.panel.Panel(row: 'int' = 0, col: 'int' = 0, rowspan: 'int' = 1, colspan: 'int' = 1, padding: 'Edges' = <factory>, margin: 'Edges' = <factory>, background_color: 'Optional[str]' = None, border: 'Optional[str]' = None, border_radius: 'float' = 0.0, h_align: 'HAlign' = <HAlign.STRETCH: 'stretch'>, v_align: 'VAlign' = <VAlign.STRETCH: 'stretch'>, constraints: 'Constraints' = <factory>, min_size: 'Size' = <factory>, fixed_size: 'Optional[Size]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.layout.panel.VAlign(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

Grid layout engine — pure math, no renderer dependencies.

class reporting.layout.grid.Grid(rows: 'int', cols: 'int', row_sizes: 'Optional[list[Sizing]]' = None, col_sizes: 'Optional[list[Sizing]]' = None, gap: 'float' = 0.0, padding: 'Optional[Edges]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

Bases: object

Bases: object

Bases: BaseElement

Base element type — backend-agnostic content representation.

class reporting.elements.base.BaseElement(element_type: 'ElementType', properties: 'dict[str, Any]'=<factory>)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.elements.base.ElementType(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

Text element — rich text content, backend-agnostic.

class reporting.elements.text.TextAlignment(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

class reporting.elements.text.TextBlock(runs: 'list[TextRun]', alignment: 'TextAlignment' = <TextAlignment.LEFT: 'left'>, spacing_before: 'float' = 0.0, spacing_after: 'float' = 0.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.elements.text.TextElement(text: 'str' = '', **kwargs: 'object') → 'None'[source]

Bases: BaseElement

Bases: object

Image element — backend-agnostic image reference.

Bases: BaseElement

class reporting.elements.image.ImageFormat(*values)[source]

Bases: Enum

Figure element — wraps a matplotlib figure, backend-agnostic.

class reporting.elements.figure.FigureElement(figure: 'object' = None, **kwargs: 'object') → 'None'[source]

Bases: BaseElement

Table element — wraps a pandas DataFrame, backend-agnostic.

class reporting.elements.table.ConditionalFormat(column: 'str' = '', highlight_max: 'bool' = False, highlight_min: 'bool' = False, color_map: 'Optional[str]' = None, threshold: 'Optional[float]' = None)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.elements.table.TableElement(data: 'object' = None, **kwargs: 'object') → 'None'[source]

Bases: BaseElement

Container element — allows nesting a Grid inside another Grid.

class reporting.elements.container.ContainerElement(grid: 'Optional[Grid]' = None, **kwargs: 'object') → 'None'[source]

Bases: BaseElement

Spacer element — occupies empty space in a layout.

class reporting.elements.spacer.SpacerElement(width: 'float' = 0.0, height: 'float' = 0.0, **kwargs: 'object') → 'None'[source]

Bases: BaseElement

Bases: object

Bases: object

Bases: Theme

class reporting.styles.TableStyle(zebra: 'Optional[ZebraStyle]' = None, heatmap: 'Optional[HeatmapStyle]' = None, highlight_max_color: 'str' = '#C6EFCE', highlight_min_color: 'str' = '#FFC7CE', font_size: 'float' = 10.0, header_font_size: 'float' = 11.0, font_family: 'str' = 'Helvetica', padding: 'float' = 4.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.Theme(name: 'str', palette: 'ColorPalette', typography: 'Typography', table_style: 'TableStyle')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.Typography(heading_1: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, heading_2: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, heading_3: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, body: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, caption: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, code: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, mono: 'FontSpec' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.ZebraStyle(even_row_color: 'str' = '#F3F3F3', odd_row_color: 'str' = '#FFFFFF', header_color: 'str' = '#4472C4', header_text_color: 'str' = '#FFFFFF', border_color: 'str' = '#D9D9D9')[source]

Bases: object

Color system — defines colors and palettes for themes.

class reporting.styles.colors.Color(hex: 'str', r: 'int', g: 'int', b: 'int', alpha: 'float' = 1.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.colors.ColorPalette(primary: 'Color', secondary: 'Color', accent: 'Color', background: 'Color', text_primary: 'Color', text_secondary: 'Color', border: 'Color', error: 'Color', warning: 'Color', success: 'Color')[source]

Bases: object

Typography system — defines font configurations for themes.

class reporting.styles.typography.FontSpec(family: 'str' = 'Helvetica', size: 'float' = 12.0, bold: 'bool' = False, italic: 'bool' = False, color: 'Optional[str]' = None, underline: 'bool' = False)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.typography.Typography(heading_1: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, heading_2: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, heading_3: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, body: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, caption: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, code: 'FontSpec' = <factory>, mono: 'FontSpec' = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Table styling system — defines zebra, heatmap, and conditional formats.

class reporting.styles.table_style.HeatmapStyle(color_map: 'str' = 'YlOrRd', min_color: 'str' = '#FFFFCC', max_color: 'str' = '#FF0000')[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.table_style.TableStyle(zebra: 'Optional[ZebraStyle]' = None, heatmap: 'Optional[HeatmapStyle]' = None, highlight_max_color: 'str' = '#C6EFCE', highlight_min_color: 'str' = '#FFC7CE', font_size: 'float' = 10.0, header_font_size: 'float' = 11.0, font_family: 'str' = 'Helvetica', padding: 'float' = 4.0)[source]

Bases: object

class reporting.styles.table_style.ZebraStyle(even_row_color: 'str' = '#F3F3F3', odd_row_color: 'str' = '#FFFFFF', header_color: 'str' = '#4472C4', header_text_color: 'str' = '#FFFFFF', border_color: 'str' = '#D9D9D9')[source]

Bases: object

Theme system — defines visual themes for reports.

Renderers

class reporting.renderers.BaseRenderer[source]

Bases: ABC

class reporting.renderers.HTMLRenderer(standalone: bool = True)[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

class reporting.renderers.PDFRenderer[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

class reporting.renderers.PPTXRenderer[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

Abstract base renderer — defines the renderer interface.

class reporting.renderers.base.BaseRenderer[source]

Bases: ABC

PDF renderer — generates PDF output using ReportLab with absolute positioning.

class reporting.renderers.pdf.renderer.PDFRenderer[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

PPTX renderer — generates PowerPoint output using python-pptx.

class reporting.renderers.pptx.renderer.PPTXRenderer[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

HTML renderer — generates HTML/CSS output.

class reporting.renderers.html.renderer.HTMLRenderer(standalone: bool = True)[source]

Bases: BaseRenderer

Utils

Utility functions for the reporting framework.

Helper utilities for matplotlib figure handling.
